title: ArtifactLink component for clickable artifact notifications
purpose: Provides a styled clickable link for artifact notifications that displays icons, type labels, and artifact names with dark mode support.
module_context: Exports an ArtifactLink React component with TypeScript interface and helper functions for icon and type label generation.

steps.content: Return the document icon emoji for document artifact types.
Return the diagram icon emoji for diagram artifact types.
Return a default attachment icon for unrecognized artifact types.
Capitalize the first letter of the type string.
Extract notification and onClick props from the component input.
Define a click handler that calls the onClick prop with artifact id and type.
Generate the icon emoji based on the artifact type.
Generate the capitalized type label for display.
Render a button element with styling for inline display and hover effects.
Set the button title attribute to describe the artifact and action.
Display the icon, type label, and artifact name within the button.
